## For Development Team

### Workflow Checklist

- [ ] Spec created: `docs/specs/[feature-name].md`
- [ ] Spec approved by user
- [ ] Tests planned
- [ ] Implementation complete
- [ ] Quality gates passed
- [ ] User testing approved
- [ ] Documentation generated
- [ ] Ready for commit
